notes: Iran row/QID/photo audit 2026-05-24: verifier confirmed all 30 squad-table rows and existing QID identities. Added confirmed QIDs for Mohammad Khalife (Q135684607), Danial Eiri (Q137779066), and Amirmohammad Razzaghinia (Q123469788). Added verified Commons P18 photo for Amirmohammad Razzaghinia. Corrected Mohammad Ghorbani DOB to 2001-10-07 from stronger enwiki/AFC Al Wahda evidence while preserving the squad-table DOB conflict. Mohammad Khalife, Danial Eiri, Hadi Habibinejad, and Amirhossein Mahmoudi had no clean Wikimedia portrait and are marked reviewed-none; Amirhossein Mahmoudi has no confirmed QID.
